item.title: Interesting merger arbitrage: ACME Corp acquisition by BigCo
item.description: ACME Corp (ACME) is being acquired by BigCo at $45 per share. Current price $42.50, 5.9% spread.

item.title: Net cash play: BustedBio Inc trading below cash
item.description: BustedBio (BBIO) has $12/share net cash but trades at $8. Failed Phase 3. Strategic alternatives.
